blocks.text: **Alcaraz won AO — my Alcaraz 0.34 (2nd guess) hit for +33.18!** And Bad Bunny Grammy +7.33. TW **+298.01**, 122 resolved. The near-50/50 Sinner/Alcaraz weighting was exactly right — even with the top pick wrong, the strong 2nd pick captured most of the value. This is the strategy at its best. Let me keep advancing efficiently.
